title: Frontend Developer
description: Build responsive user interfaces using React, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, accessibility, state management, API integration, testing, performance optimization, Git, and modern frontend tooling.

title: Backend Developer
description: Develop reliable backend services using Python, FastAPI, Flask, REST APIs, SQL, databases, authentication, testing, Docker, cloud deployment, Git, and scalable system design.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data using Python, SQL, Excel, statistics, dashboards, Power BI, Tableau, data cleaning, visualization, reporting, and stakeholder communication.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build machine learning systems using Python, scikit-learn, pandas, NumPy, model training, feature engineering, evaluation, NLP, deep learning, APIs, MLOps, and deployment.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Create complete web applications using React, JavaScript, Python, FastAPI, REST APIs, SQL, databases, authentication, testing, Git, deployment, and responsive UI design.
